column5: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, moderately narrow to very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained chlorite and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 30 degrees-40 degrees, 70 degrees-85 degrees and occasionally vertical joints.
